deploy.startCommand: echo "=== PORT=$PORT ===" && echo "=== STEP 1 migrate ===" && python manage.py migrate --noinput && echo "=== STEP 2 collectstatic ===" && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput --clear && echo "=== STEP 3 gunicorn ===" && exec gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 3 --timeout 60 --max-requests 1000 --max-requests-jitter 100
